title: Liberator (disambiguation)
content:
'''Liberator''' could refer to several things:

==[[Canon]]==
*'''''[[Liberator (CR90 corvette)|Liberator]]''''', a [[CR90 corvette]] that served as the flagship of the [[Phoenix Cell]]'s leader [[Jun Sato]]
*'''''[[Phoenix Nest|Liberator]]''''', a [[Quasar Fire-class cruiser-carrier|''Quasar Fire''-class cruiser-carrier]] stolen by Phoenix Cell and renamed the ''Phoenix Nest''
*'''''[[Liberator (Venator-class)|Liberator]]''''', a [[Venator-class Star Destroyer|''Venator''-class Star Destroyer]] in service to the [[Imperial Navy]]

==[[Star Wars Legends|Legends]]==
*'''''[[Liberator (Mere)|Liberator]]''''', a ship used by the [[Mere Resistance]]
*'''''[[Liberator (Imperial I-class)|Liberator]]''''', previously known as the ''Adjudicator'', an [[Imperial I-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial I''-class Star Destroyer]]
*'''''[[Liberator (Liberator-class)|Liberator]]''''', a troopship once known as ''Trader's Luck''
*'''''[[Liberator (frigate)|Liberator]]''''', a [[Frigate/Legends|frigate]] in the [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Starfleet]]
*'''''[[Liberator (EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate)|Liberator]]''''', a [[EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate/Legends|EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate]] under the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]]
*'''''[[Liberator (light freighter)|Liberator]]''''', a [[Pirate/Legends|pirate]] freighter
*'''''[[Satellite Liberator]]''''', an [[XR12/Legends|XR12]] [[Starship/Legends|ship]]
*'''[[Heavy Liberator]]''', an [[Water/Legends|aquatic]] [[Repulsorcraft/Legends|repulsorcraft]] used by the [[Wookiee/Legends|Wookiees]]
*'''[[Liberator (Wookiees)|Liberator]]''', another [[anti-air destroyer]] used by the Wookiees

==See also==
*[[Liberator-class (disambiguation)|'''''Liberator''-class (disambiguation)''']]
